title: From Horatio Alger to Eugene Debs : oral history transcript / 1956
creator: Coggins, Herbert Leonard, 1881-

description: Notes on family influences and early life; work for publishers in Philadelphia and San Francisco; recollections of California Literary figures; Socialist Party connections; his worker-run business: interest in ornithology and writing. Portrait and signed statement inserted
